overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a sunny, grassy countryside. The character traverses rolling hills with scattered trees, passes wooden fences and sunflowers, and approaches a distant windmill while a castle tower looms on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with scattered trees and shrubs

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through grassy terrain with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the grass
green grassy slope rising on the left side
green grassy slope rising on the right side
dense green shrubs lining the right side of the path
tall evergreen tree visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by grassy hills and scattered vegetation. The path winds through moderate greenery with tall trees visible in the background under a bright summer sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path with wooden fencing and distant views

events.description: Geralt stops walking and the camera pans to survey the open landscape and distant tower
Geralt resumes walking along the path toward the horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses to observe the scenic view of the distant tower and surrounding countryside, then continues his journey

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts running alongside the left side of the path
tall stone tower or castle spire visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into wide countryside with a wooden fence on the left. Geralt stops to look at a distant tower on the horizon, then continues walking along the sunlit path.

events.description: large wooden windmill comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path passing tall sunflowers with a windmill now visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall yellow sunflowers lining the right side of the trail
large dark wooden windmill with four blades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the trail now lined with sunflowers on the right. The landscape remains open with the distant tower still visible, and a large wooden windmill appears on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily toward the large wooden windmill that now dominates the view ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the large wooden windmill which now stands prominently in the center of the view. The path continues toward the structure with grassy hills on either side and the distant tower still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from an enclosed green valley into an expansive, sun-drenched countryside. It begins with Geralt walking through a narrow path flanked by grassy hills and scattered vegetation under a bright summer sky. As the trail opens into a wider landscape, the camera passes a wooden fence and pauses as Geralt looks toward a distant tower looming on the horizon. The scene then shifts to a stretch of path lined with vibrant sunflowers, with the distant tower remaining visible as a large wooden windmill emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera advances toward the windmill until it stands prominently in the center of the view, framed by rolling grassy hills.
